title: hamamelis virginiana var. mexicana
intro: Hamamelis virginiana var. mexicana, commonly known as Mexican witch hazel, is a variety of the Hamamelis virginiana plant, a type of flowering shrub native to North America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include astringent, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. Mexican witch hazel is used to treat various health issues, such as skin irritations, wounds, and digestive problems, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and improving gut health. The plant can be prepared into herbal preparations like teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
